UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific game data and progress, linked to an external authentication system's user ID.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, matching the external authentication system's user ID (UID).

coins.description: The number of in-game units the user has accumulated.

exp.description: Experience points earned through mission completion.

currentLevel.description: The highest level index the user has unlocked.

completedLevels.description: List of level IDs successfully cleared.

unlockedLevels.description: List of level IDs currently available to the user.

badges.description: List of merit badges earned for specific algorithms.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user-specific game data and progress. The `userId` matches `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

firestore.reasoning: Standardized the UserProfile schema to match the operational game logic, ensuring EXP, score, and badges are properly tracked in the backend blueprint.
